name: vega-security-header-lens
description: Firefox-first read-only HTTP security header lens for authorized review.

scripts.lint: npx --yes web-ext lint --source-dir . --warnings-as-errors --ignore-files scripts/verify_extension.py package.json package-lock.json README.md PRIVACY.md SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md
scripts.build: npx --yes web-ext build --source-dir . --overwrite-dest --ignore-files scripts/verify_extension.py package.json package-lock.json README.md PRIVACY.md SECURITY.md CONTRIBUTING.md
